overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a rainy night in Los Santos. The player exits a vehicle at a city intersection and proceeds on foot through wet streets, crossing intersections and walking along tree-lined sidewalks with the downtown skyline visible in the background.

events.description: character exits vehicle and stands at intersection corner

agents.ego_description: exiting the vehicle and standing at the rainy intersection, weapon visible in hand

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt with reflective puddles at the intersection
tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
illuminated high-rise buildings with lit windows against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a vehicle during a heavy downpour at night. The character exits the car, transitioning to a first-person perspective standing at a wet urban intersection. The downtown skyline with illuminated skyscrapers is visible in the distance, while rain creates reflective surfaces on the asphalt.

events.description: yellow taxi drives past from left to right across the intersection
continues walking straight across the wet intersection toward the skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide intersection through heavy rain, heading toward the downtown skyline

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street, illuminated by streetlights

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the expansive wet intersection, with the illuminated downtown skyline dominating the forward view. A yellow taxi passes by on the left, and palm trees become visible along the street edges. The heavy rain continues, creating reflective surfaces on the crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with turning lane and apartment buildings

events.description: turns left at the intersection to follow the curved street
green SUV passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing along the curved street, passing road markings

notable_agents.action: green SUV driving past on the right side of the road

entered.detail: large white painted arrows on the asphalt indicating lane directions
multi-story residential buildings with illuminated windows lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a curved city street, moving away from the main intersection. Large white arrow markings appear on the road surface, and apartment buildings with lit windows line the left side. A green SUV passes by on the right as the character continues walking through the rain.

events.description: moves from street onto tree-lined sidewalk with grass strips

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing under tree canopy, approaching pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk, carrying an object

entered.detail: large leafy trees forming a canopy over the sidewalk, trunk visible in foreground
wet concrete pavement with grass strip separating it from the road
black metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a tree-lined sidewalk, moving under a canopy of large street trees. The environment becomes more enclosed with apartment buildings now closer on the left. A pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction, and the rain continues to fall heavily on the wet concrete path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the interior of a vehicle into a rain-drenched urban environment that shifts from an open city intersection to a sheltered, tree-lined sidewalk. It begins as the character exits a car during a heavy downpour, stepping onto a wet intersection where the illuminated downtown skyline glows in the distance. As the camera moves across the reflective asphalt and crosswalks, a yellow taxi passes by before the view shifts toward a curved street marked with large white arrows and lined with lit apartment buildings. The scene then transitions away from the open road as a green SUV passes, leading the character onto a concrete path. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves under a canopy of large street trees and passes a pedestrian amidst the persistent heavy rain.
